error_signature: workers starting active workflows despite configuration
title: Workers incorrectly starting active workflows in queue mode
symptom: The n8n worker instances are attempting to start active workflows, which should only be managed by the main instance. This behavior persists despite correct configuration settings.
applies_when: Workers are set to run in queue mode
not_this_if: Workers are correctly configured with 'command: worker' in the compose file
root_cause: The workers are not being correctly instructed to operate as worker instances due to missing configuration in the Docker Compose file. Without the proper command, they default to main instance behavior, leading to conflicts in workflow management.
fix_steps: Add 'command: worker' under the worker instances configuration
Restart the Docker containers to apply the changes
agent_instruction: Update the Docker Compose file to include 'command: worker' for the worker instances and restart the containers.
